balanceGeneral.instruction1: Enter all amounts in US dollars (USD). Use two decimal places.
balanceGeneral.instruction2: Assets: Include all property, investments, and cash held by the entity.
balanceGeneral.instruction3: Liabilities: Include all debts and obligations of the entity.
balanceGeneral.instruction4: Income: Include all revenue received during the fiscal year.

panamaAssets.subtitle: Asset-Holding Entity with Panamanian Beneficial Owner
panamaAssets.introText: The undersigned hereby declares that the entity identified above satisfies the conditions set forth in Article 4 of Executive Decree No. 177 of December 30, 2024, regarding the obligation to file accounting records declarations:
panamaAssets.requirement1: The entity holds assets exclusively in:
panamaAssets.requirement2: The ultimate beneficial owners registered with the SSNF hold exclusively Panamanian nationality.
panamaAssets.requirement3: The entity does not conduct activities that generate taxable income in the Republic of Panama.
